ATTACK
BOSTON GUARD • WLL

CHARLOTTE NORTH

Charlotte North is the headline star for the Boston Guard and one of the defining faces of women's lacrosse. The Guard are built around her scoring gravity, range, and ability to finish possessions from anywhere above or below the arc.
